constraints.description: Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
Maximum EU contribution per project is €19,000,000. Indicative topic budget is €38,000,000 covering an indicative 2 projects.
All proposals are expected to allocate tasks for cohesion activities with the European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA) and the CSA HORIZON-CL4-2025-03-HUMAN-18: GenAI4EU central Hub.
Communicable results should be shared with the European R&D community through the AI-on-demand platform.
Projects selected in this topic should link to the resources offered by the AI Factories, including the Data Labs.
All proposals are expected to incorporate mechanisms for assessing and demonstrating progress, including qualitative and quantitative KPIs, benchmarking, and progress monitoring.

To ensure portfolio coverage, grants will be awarded not only in order of ranking but also to at least one proposal focusing on each of three sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving, subject to proposals passing all evaluation thresholds. This is an award-stage selection procedure exception.

Financial Support to Third Parties (FSTP) is permitted. Maximum financial support per third party: €2,550,000. Maximum per grant at FSTP stage 2: €300,000. Maximum per grant at FSTP stage 3: €2,250,000.
When possible, proposals should build on and reuse public results from relevant previous funded actions.

Maximum project duration is 48 months. This value is not explicitly stated in the topic text and is drawn from the call binding metadata as the standard maximum for large RIA actions under Horizon Europe.
constraints.assumption_note: The topic text and call extract do not explicitly state the project duration limit. The value of 48 months is sourced from selected_call.json, which itself carries the note: 'Max project duration not explicitly stated in the topic text; 48 months is the standard maximum for large RIA actions under Horizon Europe. Verify against General Annex B for the applicable instrument constraints.' This value must be verified against Tier 1 General Annex B before downstream reliance.

constraints.description: Proposals should build on or seek collaboration with relevant projects and develop synergies with other relevant international, European, national, or regional initiatives.
Project results will contribute to the Apply AI strategy.
